summary: The diff shows modifications to QuizPage.tsx that implement question progression logic with answer selection validation, next/previous navigation, and dual submission paths for authenticated (backend) and anonymous (localStorage) users. The changes appear to address both requirements, though the file is truncated so full verification is limited.

hallucinated_features.description: Addition of default hardcoded quiz questions (DEFAULT_QUESTIONS array with 5 questions)
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states in non-goals: 'Adding new quiz questions or modifying question content'. The diff shows a DEFAULT_QUESTIONS constant with hardcoded questions that serves as fallback when backend has no questions.
BuildRequest only mentions 'Next' or submit button functionality. The diff shows a handlePrevious function and ChevronLeft icon import for backward navigation, which was not requested.
